task_description: Transform the plain landing page into a visually stunning, modern page with 3D elements, dynamic animations, glassmorphism, floating particles, animated counters, and interactive hover effects using framer-motion and CSS 3D transforms.

verification.summary: npm run build passes (Next.js Turbopack, all routes compile). npm run lint passes with no errors. No test framework in project so test_quality is skipped. No Dockerfile present.
